generalDescription: Configure instance-wide defaults that affect how operator-visible logs are displayed.
censorUsernameDescription: Hide the username segment in home-directory paths and similar operator-visible log output. Standalone username mentions outside of paths are not yet masked in the live transcript view. This is off by default.
schedulerDescription: Agents with a timer heartbeat enabled across all of your companies.
noHeartbeats: No scheduler heartbeats match the current criteria.
disableConfirm_one: Disable timer heartbeats for all {{count}} enabled agent?
disableConfirm_other: Disable timer heartbeats for all {{count}} enabled agents?
failedDisable_other: Failed to disable {{count}} of {{total}} timer heartbeats. First error: {{detail}}
experimentalDescription: Experimental features that may change or be removed.
deleteCompanyConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this company? This action cannot be undone.
interfaceLanguageDescription: Choose the language for the user interface. Changes apply immediately.
enableIsolatedWorkspacesDescription: Show execution workspace controls in project configuration and allow isolated workspace behavior for new and existing issue runs.
autoRestartDevServerDescription: In `pnpm dev:once`, wait for all queued and running local agent runs to finish, then restart the server automatically when backend changes or migrations make the current boot stale.
noCompanySelected: No company selected. Select a company from the switcher above.
companyNameHint: The display name for your company.
descriptionHint: Optional description shown in the company profile.
logoHint: Upload a PNG, JPEG, WEBP, GIF, or SVG logo image.
brandColorHint: Sets the hue for the company icon. Leave empty for auto-generated color.
requireBoardApproval: Require board approval for new hires
requireBoardApprovalHint: New agent hires stay pending until approved by board.
inviteHint: Generate an OpenClaw agent invite snippet.
importExportMoved: Import and export have moved to dedicated pages accessible from the
archiveDescription: Archive this company to hide it from the sidebar. This persists in the database.
signInDescription: Use your email and password to access this instance.
signUpDescription: Create an account for this instance. Email confirmation is not required in v1.
fillRequiredFields: Please fill in all required fields.
